section_help.scripted_sentences: A collection of 2,400 sentences across four sets (600 each). Each actor performs a set in seven distinct styles. All sets share a core group of 30 "parallel" sentences for direct cross-actor comparison. Each emotion has about 30-40 minutes of audio per actor.
section_help.contrastive_emphasis: A specialized set of 180 sentences (30 per set) designed to highlight prosodic shifts. Each sentence is performed by all 6 actors across 6 distinct emphasis styles, providing a fully parallel corpus for analyzing how stress changes linguistic meaning. Each set has about 2 minutes of audio per actor.
section_help.numbers_emails: This contains 126 sentences and has about 15 minutes of audio per actor.
section_help.long_form_material: This contains 2 passages from books (between 400 and 800 words) and 6 medium-length news articles. It has about 18 minutes of audio per actor.
section_help.vad_personas: Each persona contains about 15 passages to be recorded. Each persona has about 15 minutes of audio  per actor.
section_help.singing: This contains lines or partial lines from 5 short, well-known songs. About 3 minutes of audio per actor.
section_help.generated_audio: Model-generated or synthetic clips. Files live under `audio_library/generated/`.
section_help.conditioning_clips: Reference / conditioning audio for models. Files live under `audio_library/conditioning_clips/`.
section_help.unscripted_dialogue: Actors worked in pairs to produce unscripted audio in 27 different styles, based on provided prompts. Isolated tracks and mixed tracks are available.
